title: Firestarter
meaning_summary: Its confrontational energy and instantly recognizable hook make it durable in both streaming and sync-heavy contexts.
revenue_drivers: Workout and high-energy playlists create repeat listening.
Its aggressive identity supports sync and trailer value.
Catalog familiarity keeps the track discoverable years after release.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: Firestarter is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
